info.name: GidoStorage Backend
info.description: Auth, clients, bookings (calendar / schedule), folders, dashboard, settings, share (public), SMS (Arkesel), in-app notifications (admin). Bookings: GET /api/bookings/meta, summary/week, list ?year=&month=, POST create, GET one, PUT or PATCH edit (partial), DELETE remove. Unpaid final SMS defaults, final-delivery upload fields, PATCH .../final-delivery/lock (lock finals anytime) and .../unlock. Raw watermarking when settings.watermarkPreviewImages is true. Notifications: GET/PATCH /api/notifications (role admin).

request.description: Logs in with email and password. On success, the returned JWT is automatically saved to the {{token}} collection variable and used by other requests.
Resets a user's password by email. Body requires email, newPassword and confirmPassword.
Returns the currently authenticated user. Requires a valid Bearer token.
Updates the logged-in user. Optional fields: name, contact (Ghana-style phone for booking reminder SMS to the studio user). Omitted fields are unchanged.
Logs out the current user. Adds the token to a server-side blacklist so it can no longer be used. Also clears the {{token}} collection variable.
Admin only. Returns notifications, total, unreadCount. Each item: type, title, body, folder, booking, shareIdentifier (for gallery deep links), readAt, createdAt.
Badge count for admin UI.
Set readAt. Run List notifications first to set {{notificationId}}, or paste an _id.
Marks every notification for the current admin as read.

Returns user, aggregate stats (clients & galleries), recent galleries (cover, title, client, status, dates), and a merged activity feed. Optional query: recentLimit (default 8), activityLimit (default 15).
Aggregated storage (bytes) and by_category percentages for raws, selections, finals. Based on FolderMedia.size.
Per-folder usage with client name. Query: sort_by=total_size|name, order=asc|desc. Defaults: total_size + desc; name + asc.

Returns placeholders, recipient types, Arkesel flag, bulkSend, smsBulkDefaultClientName, smsBranding { prefixSet, suffixSet } (SMS_BRAND_PREFIX / SMS_BRAND_SUFFIX on server). Upload SMS uses SMS_NOTIFY_*; see folder upload requests.

One Arkesel API call per request. For recipientType client, send clientId OR client OR selectedClientId (string id or { _id }). all_clients: {{client_name}} uses SMS_BULK_DEFAULT_CLIENT_NAME / "there". Placeholders {{event_date}}/{{gallery_link}} need folderId. See GET /api/sms/meta → singleClientIdFields.

query.description: Optional. Matches message, recipient name or phone.

request.description: Paginated log for the Recent Messages UI (recipient, message, length, status, costGHS, timestamps). Each document includes trigger: manual | raw_upload | final_upload | final_delivery_unpaid | booking_reminder_client | booking_reminder_admin (manual is POST /api/sms/send; upload triggers are automatic after successful batches when SMS is enabled; booking reminders use a cron ~BOOKING_REMINDER_HOURS_BEFORE hours before startsAt).
Creates a new client. Required: name, contact, location. Optional: email. Saves the new client's id into the {{clientId}} collection variable for the other requests.

query.description: Optional. Filters by name, email, contact or location (case-insensitive).

request.description: Send only the fields you want to change. Any of name, email, contact, location.
Returns shootTypes[] { id, label, color } for filters and calendar dots.
Sunday–Saturday in server local time: bookedCount, weekStartsAt, weekEndsAt.

query.description: Use with month for calendar grid.
Optional: Wedding | Portraits | Outdoor | Birthday | Graduation | Christening | Commercial | Other
Alternative: ISO range with to= (omit year/month).

request.description: bookings[] sorted by startsAt; each includes color for UI. Or ?from=&to= instead of year/month.

clientId required (Mongo id from GET /api/clients). No phone field — contact is on booking.client.contact when populated. date: YYYY-MM-DD or DD/MM/YYYY. start/end: HH:mm or h:mm AM/PM, or startsAt/endsAt ISO. Reminder SMS: server cron ~24h before startsAt (BOOKING_REMINDER_* env); client gets SMS from client.contact; admin from PATCH /api/auth/me contact or BOOKING_REMINDER_ADMIN_PHONE.

Full or partial update (send only fields to change). Same rules as create for date/start/end or startsAt/endsAt ISO. Changing startsAt clears booking reminder SMS / in-app flags so reminders can fire again for the new time. Use endsAt: null or end: "" to clear end time. Also available: PATCH (identical handler) for clients that prefer partial updates.
Same validation as PUT; use for partial JSON bodies.
Permanently removes the booking for the logged-in creator. Response: message, deletedId, booking (last snapshot for UI cache).

Returns defaultCoverImageUrl, watermarkPreviewImages (boolean), updatedAt. When watermark is on, new raw uploads get a generated watermarked preview file (see folder raw upload / GET folder / GET share).

formdata.description: Image file to use as the system-wide default folder cover.

request.description: Uploads a default cover image. Use form-data with key 'defaultCoverImage' (type: File).

Turns watermarkPreviewImages on or off (JSON body). When true, each subsequent POST .../media/raw generates a companion JPEG (*-wm.jpg): images get three large diagonal PREVIEW stamps (no event title); videos get the same plus fixed "Video — preview only" at the bottom. Admin GET folder lists originals as url plus displayUrl when generated. Public GET /api/share/:id serves watermarked URLs as url on uploads and nested selection.raw when a display file exists. Existing uploads are unchanged until re-uploaded.

formdata.description: Optional image file.
Optional. true/false.

request.description: Combined update. You can send any subset of fields; only what you include changes. If watermarkPreviewImages is true, enable watermark generation for new raw uploads (see Toggle watermark preview).
Resets settings: clears the default cover image (also deletes the file) and turns watermarkPreviewImages off.

formdata.description: Optional. never | 7d | 14d | 30d | 60d | 90d | 180d | 365d. See Get share link expiry presets.
Optional. If omitted and useDefaultCover=true, the default cover from settings is used.

request.description: Creates a folder. Use form-data. Required: client, eventName, eventDate. Optional: linkExpiry, description, coverImage (file). Saves folderId and shareIdentifier on success.
Creates a folder using the default cover from settings. JSON body, no file upload.

query.description: Optional. Searches event name and description (case-insensitive).

request.description: Returns { presets } for the Link expiry dropdown. Each preset has id (send as linkExpiry), label, days.

Updates share settings. Body examples: { "linkExpiry": "30d" }, { "slug": "my-wedding" }, { "selectionLocked": false, "clearSelectionSubmit": true }, { "maxClientSelections": 20 } (limit client picks), { "maxClientSelections": null } or 0 (unlimited). Response folder matches GET /api/folders/:id (includes uploads, selection, finals, sets).
After a client clicks Submit Selection, use this so they can change picks again (optional).

Limits how many photos a client can select in the share gallery. Validation: null, 0, or omit field on PATCH with only other keys = unlimited; 1–9999 = max picks. Response includes full folder (same shape as GET folder) with folder.share.maxClientSelections and top-level maxClientSelections.
Removes the client selection cap (unlimited picks).
Issues a new share code (old /share/<code> URLs stop working). Optional: clearSlug true removes custom slug. Optional: linkExpiry / expiresAt / expiresInDays to reset the expiry window from now.

Sets finalDelivery.imagesLocked true anytime (e.g. you unlocked by mistake or client did not pay). Optional body: outstandingAmountGHS | amountRemainingGHS | balance | amount (positive number), or null/"" to clear balance. Omit all amount keys to lock without changing outstandingAmountGHS. Share gallery then serves watermarked locked-preview URLs and blocks full download until PATCH .../final-delivery/unlock.

After payment is confirmed: clears finalDelivery.imagesLocked and outstandingAmountGHS so the client can download full finals from the share gallery (GET .../download). Response includes updated folder with finalDelivery.

Returns folder details plus uploads, selection, finals, and set metadata. share.maxClientSelections (and top-level maxClientSelections): null = unlimited, number = max client picks. Each media item includes setId. Also includes uploadsBySet, selectionBySet, finalsBySet buckets (with General for uncategorized) plus set counts: rawCount, selectionCount, finalCount.
Returns all active sets for the folder with per-set counts (rawCount, selectionCount, finalCount) plus General counts and totals.
Creates a sub-gallery set inside the folder (e.g. Traditional, Knocking, Reception). Name is unique per folder (case-insensitive).
Renames/reorders a set. Pass any subset of fields.
Soft-deletes a set and moves its linked media to General (setId = null).

Sends kind + filenames[] (e.g. every file.name before a big batch). Optional setId scopes duplicate checks to a specific set for raw/final uploads. Uses batched DB queries (not one query per file). Response: hasConflicts, conflicts[], truncated, maxFilenames.

formdata.description: Pick many images at once (key: files). Max 1000 files per request; per-file max defaults to 500MB (FOLDER_MAX_UPLOAD_MB in .env).
Optional. Upload into a specific set. Omit (or send null/general/none) to upload into General.
Set from duplicate popup only: replace overwrites same-named raws; ignore skips them (omit defaults to ignore).

Omit = SMS after this batch (legacy). For split uploads: false on batches 1..N-1, true (or omit if SMS_UPLOAD_NOTIFY_REQUIRE_EXPLICIT_COMPLETE is false) on the LAST batch only. If SMS_UPLOAD_NOTIFY_REQUIRE_EXPLICIT_COMPLETE=true on server, omit = no SMS — send true on final batch.

request.description: Batch raw upload. Optional setId stores uploaded raws under a specific set. Popup UX: POST .../media/duplicate-preview (optionally with setId) first; if hasConflicts, ask user then upload with duplicateAction replace | ignore.

Deletes one raw upload by id (original and generated *-wm.jpg preview if present). Fails if the client has already selected this photo (remove selections first). Same as DELETE .../media/:id if that item is raw.
Deletes every raw upload in the folder (each original plus *-wm.jpg preview if present). Returns 400 if any client selection rows exist; clear selections first.

formdata.description: One or many finals (same field rules as raw). Omit selectionMediaId when uploading multiple.
Optional. Assign finals to a specific set. If omitted and selectionMediaId is provided, setId inherits from that selection.
From duplicate popup: replace overwrites same-named finals; ignore skips.
Optional, single-file uploads only. Link this final to a client selection _id.
Split uploads: false on intermediate batches; true or omit on final (unless SMS_UPLOAD_NOTIFY_REQUIRE_EXPLICIT_COMPLETE=true — then send true on last batch only).

Final delivery flow: true = client paid (clears lock & outstanding). false = unpaid: require amountRemainingGHS (positive); optional lockImagesBeforeUpload true to block downloads and serve watermarked locked-preview URLs on the share gallery. Omit all three payment fields for legacy uploads (no change to folder.finalDelivery).
Required when clientHasPaidForFinals=false. Positive number. Aliases also accepted: amountRemaining, outstandingAmountGHS, balance, amount; or nest keys inside a JSON string in field finalDelivery.
When unpaid: true enables payment lock (no downloadUrl; finals[].url points at GET .../locked-preview watermarked JPEG). false = client can still download while balance is tracked.

request.description: selectionMediaId only when uploading exactly one file. Optional setId assigns finals to a set; if omitted with selectionMediaId, final inherits selection set. Popup UX: duplicate-preview first; then duplicateAction from modal.
Deletes one final image by id. Set {{finalMediaId}} from GET folder → finals[].
Deletes every final delivery file in the folder.
editStatus: pending | in_progress | done. Set {{selectionMediaId}} from GET one folder → selection[]._id.

formdata.description: Optional. Replaces the cover image.
Set to true to switch to the default cover from settings.
Optional: draft or completed.
Optional. true/false toggles whether clients get backgroundMusicUrl on GET /api/share/:id (file must still be uploaded via Put folder background music).

request.description: Send only the fields you want to change. Use form-data so you can also replace the cover image. You can also set status to draft or completed here.

formdata.description: Required. One audio file (e.g. MP3, M4A). Field name must be backgroundMusic. Max size GALLERY_MUSIC_MAX_UPLOAD_MB (default 40).

request.description: Replaces any existing gallery background track. Response folder includes backgroundMusicUrl and backgroundMusicEnabled (set true).
Removes the stored audio file and clears folder.backgroundMusic.

Client gallery bootstrap: uploads, selection, finals, counts, canEditSelections, share.maxClientSelections (null = unlimited), share.selectionLocked / selectionSubmittedAt, finalDelivery { outstandingAmountGHS, imagesLocked }, rightsProtection, backgroundMusicEnabled + backgroundMusicUrl. When finalDelivery.imagesLocked is true, finals[].url is locked-preview. POST .../selections/sync returns 400 if rawMediaIds.length exceeds maxClientSelections; 403 when selectionLocked.

Select one raw photo. Response selection.raw uses the same URL rules as GET share (watermarked url when previews exist and setting is on). Use DELETE with clientSelectionId to deselect, or Sync selections to replace the whole set.

Replaces the client's picks with exactly this list of raw media ids (max 500 per request). Enforces share.maxClientSelections when set (400 if list too long). Returns 403 when selectionLocked. Returns selection[] with raw URLs following the same watermark rules as GET share.
Deselect one photo. selection _id from GET gallery → selection[].
Locks further pick changes until photographer unlocks via PATCH /folders/:id/share.
When the folder is payment-locked, finals[].url points here: returns a downscaled watermarked JPEG (not the original). Returns 404 when the gallery is not locked. Use as only.
Attachment download of one final. Use finals[].downloadUrl from the gallery GET, or this URL pattern.
